sections.paragraph:
ἄγκυρα, ας, ἡ (nautical term, lit. and fig.: Alcaeus et al.; SIG2 588, 168; 171; PCairZen 782a V, 64 [III b.c.]; PColZen 43, 6 [III b.c.]; PLond III, 1164h, 9 p. 164; V, 1714, 2; Jos., Vi. 167.—Jer 52:18 Sym. in special mng.) a ship’s anchor, anchor

ⓐ lit. ῥίπτειν ἀ. let go or drop an anchor Ac 27:29. ἀ. ἐκτείνειν lay out an anchor vs. 30 (Breusing 195; LCasson, Ships and Seamanship in the Anc. World, ’71, 256). ἀ. περιαιρεῖν vs. 40 (s. περιαιρέω 1).

ⓑ fig. (Eur., Hec. 80 ἄ. οἴκων; Soph., Fgm. 623 ἄ. βίου; Heliod. 7, 25, 4 πᾶσα ἐλπίδος ἄ.; IG XII, VII 123b, 3 ἄ. γήρως) of hope (Marinus, Vi. Procli 29) ἥν ὡς ἄγκυραν ἔχομεν τῆς ψυχῆς Hb 6:19 (s. PStumpf, RAC I 440–43; CSpicq, StTh 3, ’49, 185–87).—B. 737. DELG s.v. ἀγκ-. M-M.

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

Alcaeus Alcaeus , lyric poet, VII–VI b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

PColZen PColZen = Columbia Papyri III, IV: Zenon Papyri—List 4

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

mng. mng. = meaning(s)

Breusing Breusing = AB., D. Nautik d. Alten—List 6

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Heliod Heliod , III? a.d.—List 5

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

Marinus, Vi. Procli Marinus, Vi. Procli = Marinus the phil., Vita Procli; V a.d.—List 5

RAC RAC = Reallexikon für Antike u. Christentum—List 6

StTh StTh = Studia Theologica (Lund)—List 6

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 12
